title: erigeron aphanactis
intro: Erigeron aphanactis, also known as the sticky fleabane or sticky rosinweed, is a perennial plant native to the western United States. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and treating respiratory problems, including bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Erigeron aphanactis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
